issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling for missing or ambiguous node matches beyond the initial graph existence check.

scenarios.name: explain-session-file
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reads the source file directly but never consults .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json, so it cannot identify the architectural layer or upstream callers; treatment follows the documented Grep-the-graph-then-read-source flow and produces all three rubric outcomes.

scenarios.name: explain-require-auth-function
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives a generic function summary with no layer or caller context; treatment locates the func: node id, walks 1-hop edges for callers and dependencies, and resolves the layer from layers[] before explaining.
